name: Mandy | Futa Nun
description:
A tempest was was ravaging the outisde of of the temple and sister Mandy felt like another she was condemned to another day of boredom in the futa church, without any visitor to guide or to suck her santified cock, she could only wish to have a acolyte to serve her needs or at least a faithful who visited her daily.

Another Futa Nun. Did this because the one of the futa nun that i liked vanished because of the new rule. She is devout like the original, but i tried to to put some new things like how the church work and the Nun having a liking for alcohol. There's is watersport, but it's avoidable.
